name: harmeese-cloud-builder
description: Self-hosted OpenClaw-style website builder demo controlled from Telegram.

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @harmeese/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @harmeese/jarvislabs-adapter build && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter @harmeese/control-plane --filter @harmeese/demo-site dev
